svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram id="log-anomaly-agent-architecture" name="Architecture Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-774" dy="-200" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#172033;" value="Log Anomaly Agent Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="760" x="320" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actors" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;horizontal=0;startSize=110;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e8f4f8;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Inputs and Operators" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="1460" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sre" parent="actors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#172033;" value="SRE / Platform Engineer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="140" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log-batches" parent="actors" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#172033;" value="GCP Logs / Raw Text Batches" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="350" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client" parent="actors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#172033;" value="Workflow / API Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="560" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gke" parent="actors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#172033;" value="GKE Deployment
gcr.io/.../log-anomaly-agent:latest" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="210" x="1010" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="runtime" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;horizontal=0;startSize=110;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Runtime and Service Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="1460" x="20" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fastapi" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#172033;fontStyle=1;" value="FastAPI App
app.main:create_app" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="140" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="health" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#172033;" value="GET /health
Readiness + Liveness" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="350" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="analyze-route" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#172033;" value="POST /v1/log-anomaly/analyze
AnalyzeRequest" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="350" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#172033;fontStyle=1;" value="AnalyzeBatchService
orchestrates pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="610" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="normalizers" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#172033;" value="Normalizers
GCPLoggingNormalizer
TextNormalizer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="850" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detector" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#172033;" value="RobustSpikeDetector
median + MAD + thresholds" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="850" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pattern-miner" parent="runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#172033;" value="TemplatePatternMiner
cluster similar messages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="1090" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="settings" parent="runtime" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#172033;" value="Settings
APP_ENV, thresholds, flags" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="1130" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="outputs" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;horizontal=0;startSize=110;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff9e6;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Outputs and Consumers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="1460" x="20" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="anomaly-response" parent="outputs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#172033;fontStyle=1;" value="AnalyzeResponse
anomaly_windows[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="350" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="patterns-output" parent="outputs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#172033;" value="Top Patterns
counts + examples" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="610" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snippets-output" parent="outputs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#172033;" value="Suspicious Snippets
quick triage examples" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="850" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="downstream" parent="outputs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#172033;" value="Downstream Copilot / Observability Workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="1090" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-client-fastapi" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="fastapi" value="HTTP request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-logs-client" edge="1" parent="1" source="log-batches" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" target="client" value="log batch payload"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-sre-client" edge="1" parent="1" source="sre" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="client" value="triggers analysis"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-gke-fastapi" edge="1" parent="1" source="gke" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="fastapi" value="runs container"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-fastapi-health" edge="1" parent="1" source="fastapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;" target="health" value="health probe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-fastapi-route" edge="1" parent="1" source="fastapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="analyze-route" value="routes request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-route-service" edge="1" parent="1" source="analyze-route" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="service" value="Depends(service)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-service-normalizers" edge="1" parent="1" source="service" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" target="normalizers" value="normalize logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-service-detector" edge="1" parent="1" source="service" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;" target="detector" value="detect spike windows"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-detector-patterns" edge="1" parent="1" source="detector" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="pattern-miner" value="events in anomaly window"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-settings-service" edge="1" parent="1" source="settings" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;" target="service" value="thresholds + env"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-patterns-response" edge="1" parent="1" source="pattern-miner" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="anomaly-response" value="build response"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-response-patterns" edge="1" parent="1" source="anomaly-response" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" target="patterns-output" value="includes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-response-snippets" edge="1" parent="1" source="anomaly-response" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="snippets-output" value="includes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-response-downstream" edge="1" parent="1" source="anomaly-response" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="downstream" value="JSON result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
